item.title: chill - utility for use in terminal [Terminal Apps]
item.itunes:title: chill - utility for use in terminal [Terminal Apps]
item.itunes:author: Markospoko
item.itunes:summary:
chill - utility for use in terminal
(Terminal Apps)
chill is a simple script around kill command for ending process, esp. for newbies, newcomers
perhaps you could rather chill than kill that all processes?

Example:
./chill m 634458
sends TERM signal to 634458 process
./chill h 634458
sends KILL signal to 634458 process

./chill -h
for basic usage

If you put it in /usr/bin, you can use it as:
chill m 634458
[read more]
item.description:
chill - utility for use in terminal
(Terminal Apps)
chill is a simple script around kill command for ending process, esp. for newbies, newcomers
perhaps you could rather chill than kill that all processes?

Example:
./chill m 634458
sends TERM signal to 634458 process
./chill h 634458
sends KILL signal to 634458 process

./chill -h
for basic usage

If you put it in /usr/bin, you can use it as:
chill m 634458
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
chill - utility for use in terminal
(Terminal Apps)
chill is a simple script around kill command for ending process, esp. for newbies, newcomers
perhaps you could rather chill than kill that all processes?

Example:
./chill m 634458
sends TERM signal to 634458 process
./chill h 634458
sends KILL signal to 634458 process

./chill -h
for basic usage

If you put it in /usr/bin, you can use it as:
chill m 634458
[read more]

item.title: Qmmp [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:title: Qmmp [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:author: trialuser
item.itunes:summary:
Qmmp
(Audioplayers)
Qmmp (Qt-based Multimedia Player) is an audio-player, written with help of Qt library.
[b]Supported operating systems:[/b]
GNU/Linux
FreeBSD
Microsoft Windows

[b]Supported formats:[/b]
MPEG1 layer 2/3
Ogg Vorbis
Ogg Opus
Native FLAC, Ogg FLAC
Musepack
WavePack
tracker modules (mod, s3m, it, xm, etc)
ADTS AAC
CD Audio
WMA, Monkey's Audio (and other formats provided by FFmpeg library)
PCM WAVE (and other formats provided by libsndfile library)
midi
SID
chiptune formats (AY, GBS, GYM, HES, KSS, NSF, NSFE, SAP, SPC, VGM, VGZ, VTX)

[b]DSP effects:[/b]
BS2B effect
sample rate converter
LADSPA effects
extra stereo
crossfade

[b]Visual effects:[/b]
projectM visualization
spectrum analyzer

[b]Output system support:[/b]
OSS4 (FreeBSD)
ALSA (Linux)
Pulse Audio
JACK
WaveOut (Win32)
DirectSound (Win32)
WASAPI (Win32)

[b]Other features:[/b]
XMMS and Winamp 2.x skins support
alternative user interface based on standard widgets set
10-band equalizer
MP3, Vorbis, AAC, AAC+ streams support
MMS support
MPRIS
removable device detection (via UDisks)
video playback via Mplayer
lyrics
cover art support
CUE sheet support
embedded CUE support (for FLAC, WavPack and Monkey's Audio)
multiple playlists
automatic charset detection for cue files and ShoutCast metadata
playlist formats: m3u, pls, xspf
ReplayGain support
sending listening history to Last.fm, Libre.fm and ListenBrainz
CDDB support
audio converter
stream browser
audio formats conveter
external programs execution on track change
ReplayGain scanner
archive reader (RAR and 7z)
audio recording
listening history
media library

[b]Downloads[/b]
[url]https://qmmp.ylsoftware.com/downloads.php[/url]
[url]https://sourceforge.net/projects/qmmp-dev/files/[/url]
[read more]
item.description:
Qmmp
(Audioplayers)
Qmmp (Qt-based Multimedia Player) is an audio-player, written with help of Qt library.
[b]Supported operating systems:[/b]
GNU/Linux

Microsoft Windows

[b]Supported formats:[/b]
MPEG1 layer 2/3

[b]Output system support:[/b]

Pulse Audio

WaveOut (Win32)

[b]Other features:[/b]
XMMS and Winamp 2.x skins support
alternative user interface based on standard widgets set
10-band equalizer
MP3, Vorbis, AAC, AAC+ streams support
MMS support
MPRIS
removable device detection (via UDisks)
video playback via Mplayer
lyrics
cover art support
CUE sheet support
embedded CUE support (for FLAC, WavPack and Monkey's Audio)
multiple playlists
automatic charset detection for cue files and ShoutCast metadata
playlist formats: m3u, pls, xspf
ReplayGain support
sending listening history to Last.fm, Libre.fm and ListenBrainz
CDDB support
audio converter
stream browser
audio formats conveter
external programs execution on track change
ReplayGain scanner
archive reader (RAR and 7z)
audio recording
listening history
media library

[b]Downloads[/b]
[url]https://qmmp.ylsoftware.com/downloads.php[/url]
[url]https://sourceforge.net/projects/qmmp-dev/files/[/url]
[read more]

Qmmp
(Audioplayers)
Qmmp (Qt-based Multimedia Player) is an audio-player, written with help of Qt library.
[b]Supported operating systems:[/b]
GNU/Linux
FreeBSD
Microsoft Windows

[b]Supported formats:[/b]
MPEG1 layer 2/3
Ogg Vorbis
Ogg Opus
Native FLAC, Ogg FLAC
Musepack
WavePack
tracker modules (mod, s3m, it, xm, etc)
ADTS AAC
CD Audio
WMA, Monkey's Audio (and other formats provided by FFmpeg library)
PCM WAVE (and other formats provided by libsndfile library)
midi
SID
chiptune formats (AY, GBS, GYM, HES, KSS, NSF, NSFE, SAP, SPC, VGM, VGZ, VTX)

[b]DSP effects:[/b]
BS2B effect
sample rate converter

projectM visualization
spectrum analyzer

[b]Output system support:[/b]

WaveOut (Win32)

lyrics
cover art support

embedded CUE support (for FLAC, WavPack and Monkey's Audio)
multiple playlists
automatic charset detection for cue files and ShoutCast metadata
playlist formats: m3u, pls, xspf
ReplayGain support
sending listening history to Last.fm, Libre.fm and ListenBrainz
CDDB support
audio converter
stream browser
audio formats conveter
external programs execution on track change
ReplayGain scanner
archive reader (RAR and 7z)
audio recording
listening history
media library

item.title: Aspect [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:title: Aspect [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:author: sludwig
item.itunes:summary:
Aspect
(Graphic Apps)
Photo organization application with support for peer-to-peer based synchronization across devices.

[read more]
item.description:
Aspect
(Graphic Apps)
Photo organization application with support for peer-to-peer based synchronization across devices.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Aspect
(Graphic Apps)
Photo organization application with support for peer-to-peer based synchronization across devices.

[read more]

item.title: Downscaler [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: Downscaler [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: akumahunt3r
item.itunes:summary:
Downscaler
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
App to improve performance by reducing CPU and/or GPU load by reducing the display image quality to lower levels through a process known as Downscaling. Allowing for smoother performance in resource-intensive tasks such as gaming. As well as reduced power consumption.

[read more]
item.description:
Downscaler
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
App to improve performance by reducing CPU and/or GPU load by reducing the display image quality to lower levels through a process known as Downscaling. Allowing for smoother performance in resource-intensive tasks such as gaming. As well as reduced power consumption.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Downscaler
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
App to improve performance by reducing CPU and/or GPU load by reducing the display image quality to lower levels through a process known as Downscaling. Allowing for smoother performance in resource-intensive tasks such as gaming. As well as reduced power consumption.

[read more]

item.title: Fingrom [Financial]
item.itunes:title: Fingrom [Financial]
item.itunes:author: vlyskouski
item.itunes:summary:
Fingrom
(Financial)
The goal of the solution is to create a financial accounting application that is intuitive, efficient, and inclusive.
That empowers users to effortlessly manage their finances while ensuring that no one is left behind.

Features:
- Accounting
- Budget Categories
- Bills, Transfers, Incomes (Invoices)
- Goals Definition
- Exchange rates
- Metrics
- Synchronization between devices (P2P)
- Recovery via WebDav or a direct File
- Import from CSV, QIF, OFX files for Bills and Invoices
- Data encryption
- Localization
- Responsive and Adaptive Design
- Shortcuts

If you would like to come with suggestions, report bugs, translate the app, or contribute otherwise, feel free to reach out!

This is the "open-source code" application that welcomes and values contributions from the community. However, there are some limitations when it comes to making external modifications and distributions, as it follows the CC-BY-NC-ND-4.0 license. As the project's author, I am committed to upholding the "Terms of Use" and "Privacy Policy" to ensure the well-being and satisfaction of all users across all platforms (desktop, mobile, and web).
[read more]
item.description:
Fingrom
(Financial)
The goal of the solution is to create a financial accounting application that is intuitive, efficient, and inclusive.
That empowers users to effortlessly manage their finances while ensuring that no one is left behind.

- Synchronization between devices (P2P)
- Recovery via WebDav or a direct File

If you would like to come with suggestions, report bugs, translate the app, or contribute otherwise, feel free to reach out!

This is the "open-source code" application that welcomes and values contributions from the community. However, there are some limitations when it comes to making external modifications and distributions, as it follows the CC-BY-NC-ND-4.0 license. As the project's author, I am committed to upholding the "Terms of Use" and "Privacy Policy" to ensure the well-being and satisfaction of all users across all platforms (desktop, mobile, and web).
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Fingrom
(Financial)
The goal of the solution is to create a financial accounting application that is intuitive, efficient, and inclusive.
That empowers users to effortlessly manage their finances while ensuring that no one is left behind.

Features:
- Accounting
- Budget Categories
- Bills, Transfers, Incomes (Invoices)
- Goals Definition
- Exchange rates
- Metrics
- Synchronization between devices (P2P)
- Recovery via WebDav or a direct File
- Import from CSV, QIF, OFX files for Bills and Invoices
- Data encryption
- Localization
- Responsive and Adaptive Design
- Shortcuts

If you would like to come with suggestions, report bugs, translate the app, or contribute otherwise, feel free to reach out!

This is the "open-source code" application that welcomes and values contributions from the community. However, there are some limitations when it comes to making external modifications and distributions, as it follows the CC-BY-NC-ND-4.0 license. As the project's author, I am committed to upholding the "Terms of Use" and "Privacy Policy" to ensure the well-being and satisfaction of all users across all platforms (desktop, mobile, and web).
[read more]

item.title: AAAAXY [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:title: AAAAXY [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:author: divverent
item.itunes:summary:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.
[read more]
item.description:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.
[read more]

item.title: TrustVare MBOX Converter Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: TrustVare MBOX Converter Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: trustvare
item.itunes:summary:
TrustVare MBOX Converter Software
(Utilities)
The highest quality instrument for converting MBOX files of more than 15+ email clients is TrustVare MBOX Converter Software. Among the most often used email software on this long list are Mozilla Thunderbird, Apple Mail, The Bat, etc. Actually, the MBOX Converter also supports MBOX files produced by Google Takeout, cPanel, etc., To save your MBOX data, you have six export types total: PST, MSG, EML, PDF, HTML, and Office 365.
MBOX File Converter features an automatic data fetching capability for some email providers, including Thunderbird. Users' default choice is for them to include the MBOX file into the program personally. The program loads all of the data on the preview interface once the file is added successfully. Thus, allowing consumers to examine all emails and attachments in preview modes prior to conversion.

The utility offers specific settings for every export option during the MBOX file export. Although the other choices follow name convention rules. MBOX Converter also lets you choose specific email messages to export from the preview pane. MBOX Conversion Tool requires MS Outlook not at all.

Advance Features:

It supports Windows 11, 10, 8.1, 8, and 7 as well as Windows Server 2007, 2013, 2016, 2019, and 2021.

Does not run correctly without Microsoft Outlook installed.

Convert MBOX files batch or bulk into PST.

Preview choice before to the conversion.

Move MBOX files into several file formats with simplicity.

Given the free trial version for the users.
[read more]
item.description:
TrustVare MBOX Converter Software
(Utilities)
The highest quality instrument for converting MBOX files of more than 15+ email clients is TrustVare MBOX Converter Software. Among the most often used email software on this long list are Mozilla Thunderbird, Apple Mail, The Bat, etc. Actually, the MBOX Converter also supports MBOX files produced by Google Takeout, cPanel, etc., To save your MBOX data, you have six export types total: PST, MSG, EML, PDF, HTML, and Office 365.
MBOX File Converter features an automatic data fetching capability for some email providers, including Thunderbird. Users' default choice is for them to include the MBOX file into the program personally. The program loads all of the data on the preview interface once the file is added successfully. Thus, allowing consumers to examine all emails and attachments in preview modes prior to conversion.

The utility offers specific settings for every export option during the MBOX file export. Although the other choices follow name convention rules. MBOX Converter also lets you choose specific email messages to export from the preview pane. MBOX Conversion Tool requires MS Outlook not at all.

Advance Features:

It supports Windows 11, 10, 8.1, 8, and 7 as well as Windows Server 2007, 2013, 2016, 2019, and 2021.

Does not run correctly without Microsoft Outlook installed.

Convert MBOX files batch or bulk into PST.

Preview choice before to the conversion.

Move MBOX files into several file formats with simplicity.

Given the free trial version for the users.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
TrustVare MBOX Converter Software
(Utilities)
The highest quality instrument for converting MBOX files of more than 15+ email clients is TrustVare MBOX Converter Software. Among the most often used email software on this long list are Mozilla Thunderbird, Apple Mail, The Bat, etc. Actually, the MBOX Converter also supports MBOX files produced by Google Takeout, cPanel, etc., To save your MBOX data, you have six export types total: PST, MSG, EML, PDF, HTML, and Office 365.
MBOX File Converter features an automatic data fetching capability for some email providers, including Thunderbird. Users' default choice is for them to include the MBOX file into the program personally. The program loads all of the data on the preview interface once the file is added successfully. Thus, allowing consumers to examine all emails and attachments in preview modes prior to conversion.

The utility offers specific settings for every export option during the MBOX file export. Although the other choices follow name convention rules. MBOX Converter also lets you choose specific email messages to export from the preview pane. MBOX Conversion Tool requires MS Outlook not at all.

Advance Features:

It supports Windows 11, 10, 8.1, 8, and 7 as well as Windows Server 2007, 2013, 2016, 2019, and 2021.

Does not run correctly without Microsoft Outlook installed.

Convert MBOX files batch or bulk into PST.

Preview choice before to the conversion.

Move MBOX files into several file formats with simplicity.

Given the free trial version for the users.
[read more]

item.title: TrustVare OST to PST Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: TrustVare OST to PST Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: trustvare
item.itunes:summary:
TrustVare OST to PST Converter
(Utilities)
Utilize the TrustVare OST to PST Converter to seamlessly change your large OST file into Outlook PST format, ensuring a smooth process without any technical issues. This application enables you to convert complete OST data items into PST format, allowing you to access them in Outlook while ensuring no data is lost.
This solution provides users with a convenient way to convert OST to PST format while maintaining data integrity. Overall, it is an excellent option for transforming OST files into PST format. One simply needs to install the application on the Windows operating system, such as Windows 11 and others.

Capabilities

Compatible with all OST file from all versions of MS Outlook.
Maintains the entire folder structure intact following the conversion process.
User-friendly interface designed for those without technical expertise.
Offers a dual mode for converting OST files to PST format.
Users will achieve completely precise conversion outcomes without any data loss.
Enables the division of large OST files into more manageable segments.
Compatible with all versions of Windows OS.
[read more]
item.description:
TrustVare OST to PST Converter

Utilize the TrustVare OST to PST Converter to seamlessly change your large OST file into Outlook PST format, ensuring a smooth process without any technical issues. This application enables you to convert complete OST data items into PST format, allowing you to access them in Outlook while ensuring no data is lost.
This solution provides users with a convenient way to convert OST to PST format while maintaining data integrity. Overall, it is an excellent option for transforming OST files into PST format. One simply needs to install the application on the Windows operating system, such as Windows 11 and others.

TrustVare OST to PST Converter
(Utilities)
Utilize the TrustVare OST to PST Converter to seamlessly change your large OST file into Outlook PST format, ensuring a smooth process without any technical issues. This application enables you to convert complete OST data items into PST format, allowing you to access them in Outlook while ensuring no data is lost.
This solution provides users with a convenient way to convert OST to PST format while maintaining data integrity. Overall, it is an excellent option for transforming OST files into PST format. One simply needs to install the application on the Windows operating system, such as Windows 11 and others.

Capabilities

Compatible with all OST file from all versions of MS Outlook.
Maintains the entire folder structure intact following the conversion process.
User-friendly interface designed for those without technical expertise.
Offers a dual mode for converting OST files to PST format.
Users will achieve completely precise conversion outcomes without any data loss.
Enables the division of large OST files into more manageable segments.
Compatible with all versions of Windows OS.
[read more]

item.title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:author: francoisj
item.itunes:summary:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.description:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]

item.title: TrustVare Contacts Manager [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: TrustVare Contacts Manager [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: trustvare
item.itunes:summary:
TrustVare Contacts Manager
(Utilities)
Developed to easily import VCF contacts from PST, MSG, OST, and NSF files, TrustVare Contacts Manager Software is a great solution. This application can merge several smaller VCF files into one file therefore saving users time and effort. Among the several Windows operating system versions that this tool works with, including 11, 10, 8.1, 8, 7, Vista, XP, and 2000. The software eliminates users' need to use any other tool to save VCF contacts from PST, MSG, OST, or NSF files. In addition to PST, OST, MSG, NSF, Excel, and CSV files, the app provides a wide range of functions including the consolidation of various VCF contacts, the separation of big VCF files, and the contact transfer across several file formats. Utility purposes on their own and can meet a wide range of needs. During importing of a VCF file from another source, users can choose to save their contacts file to a designated location on the desktop. The complexity of the data is not limited in any sense. The app lets people with different degrees of technological ability import VCF contacts without any trouble. Any version of Microsoft Outlook or Lotus Notes will let you use the sophisticated application, which will operate without any problems or pauses. Users of this application have an opportunity of getting a free trial edition without paying extra.

[read more]
item.description:
TrustVare Contacts Manager
(Utilities)
Developed to easily import VCF contacts from PST, MSG, OST, and NSF files, TrustVare Contacts Manager Software is a great solution. This application can merge several smaller VCF files into one file therefore saving users time and effort. Among the several Windows operating system versions that this tool works with, including 11, 10, 8.1, 8, 7, Vista, XP, and 2000. The software eliminates users' need to use any other tool to save VCF contacts from PST, MSG, OST, or NSF files. In addition to PST, OST, MSG, NSF, Excel, and CSV files, the app provides a wide range of functions including the consolidation of various VCF contacts, the separation of big VCF files, and the contact transfer across several file formats. Utility purposes on their own and can meet a wide range of needs. During importing of a VCF file from another source, users can choose to save their contacts file to a designated location on the desktop. The complexity of the data is not limited in any sense. The app lets people with different degrees of technological ability import VCF contacts without any trouble. Any version of Microsoft Outlook or Lotus Notes will let you use the sophisticated application, which will operate without any problems or pauses. Users of this application have an opportunity of getting a free trial edition without paying extra.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
TrustVare Contacts Manager
(Utilities)
Developed to easily import VCF contacts from PST, MSG, OST, and NSF files, TrustVare Contacts Manager Software is a great solution. This application can merge several smaller VCF files into one file therefore saving users time and effort. Among the several Windows operating system versions that this tool works with, including 11, 10, 8.1, 8, 7, Vista, XP, and 2000. The software eliminates users' need to use any other tool to save VCF contacts from PST, MSG, OST, or NSF files. In addition to PST, OST, MSG, NSF, Excel, and CSV files, the app provides a wide range of functions including the consolidation of various VCF contacts, the separation of big VCF files, and the contact transfer across several file formats. Utility purposes on their own and can meet a wide range of needs. During importing of a VCF file from another source, users can choose to save their contacts file to a designated location on the desktop. The complexity of the data is not limited in any sense. The app lets people with different degrees of technological ability import VCF contacts without any trouble. Any version of Microsoft Outlook or Lotus Notes will let you use the sophisticated application, which will operate without any problems or pauses. Users of this application have an opportunity of getting a free trial edition without paying extra.
